name: Roseanne Barr

acts.description: Racist tweet comparing Black Obama aide Valerie Jarrett to an ape
Embracing QAnon conspiracy theories and spreading related misinformation

behavior_summary: A single racist tweet ended her comeback series and hundreds of jobs for castmates. Responded by leaning harder into conspiracy theories and MAGA politics.

art.summary: Roseanne was a genuinely groundbreaking working-class sitcom that shifted American television. The revival lasted one season before she torched it.

accountability_events: 2018 firing by ABC after racist tweet

verdict.blurb: Made one of the most important sitcoms in American television history, then nuked her own legacy with one tweet. The original show is fine to watch. She is not fine.
